THESORCERESSMOD-THE_SORCERESS_MOD.aromaP: [sine][color=B18AFF]I will write my own story, no matter the cost.[/color][/sine]
THESORCERESSMOD-THE_SORCERESS_MOD.cardsM: Sorceress cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
THESORCERESSMOD-THE_SORCERESS_MOD.descri:
A misbegotten mercenary who became someone new.
The spark of sorcery conceals a deadly blade.
THESORCERESSMOD-THE_SORCERESS_MOD.eventD: It would be a shame to let things end here.
THESORCERESSMOD-THE_SORCERESS_MOD.goldMo: [sine]Would it be so wrong to have a few fine dresses...?[/sine]
THESORCERESSMOD-THE_SORCERESS_MOD.title: The Sorceress
